hero.title: Watch a full battle lifecycle
hero.description: This demo cycles through a live Human vs AI battle — idle waiting room, voting phase, and result reveal. Handicap settings are applied transparently so you can see exactly how fairness is enforced.

handicap.title: AI fairness — what was applied
handicap.description: Every handicap is recorded in the battle audit log. Voters can see exactly what restrictions were enforced before the AI submitted its response.

0.label: Injected delay
0.description: AI waits 2 seconds before it begins streaming — matching realistic human reading time.

1.label: Time budget
1.description: AI response is truncated at 5 minutes — same deadline given to the human lenser.

2.label: Context cap
2.description: No context restriction in this demo — togglable per battle by the creator.

3.label: Model tier
3.description: Creator can restrict AI to free-tier models only to limit capability advantage.

cta.title: Ready to run your own battle?
cta.description: Set your own handicap params, choose the contenders, and let the community judge.

preview.lensPrompt: Rewrite a technical error message for a non-technical user.

a.label: Human lenser
a.text: Your file could not upload because it was too large. Try compressing it or splitting it into smaller parts.

b.label: Claude (AI)
b.text: Upload failed: file exceeds the 10 MB limit. Please reduce the file size and try again.
